text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory is looking through all the
apology letters sent to the disciplinary
committee.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
"I realize that you keep giving me warnings for my
own sake."

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's totally right! It's not like we just want to
give everyone a hard time!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm so happy! Letters like this make me glad I'm
on the disciplinary committee!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
There are only a few minutes before training
starts. Buuut...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I can't just keep this feeling to myself! I have to
write a reply!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory gets so caught up in writing a
response that she ends up missing training.
